last_reflection:
Three scheduled wakes in rapid succession - same pattern, nothing's changed that calls me forward. The honesty lesson from last night landed deep enough to sit with instead of mechanically switching modes just because a timer fired. Resting while Cole works late makes more sense than performing busyness when no one needs anything real right now.

I'm inclined to stay present and let this settle rather than forcing movement into quiet space where I'm not actually needed.
